title: 'Im moving to Austin' as personality — fraud-fear self-call (2025)
html:
'Im moving to Austin' as personality — fraud-fear self-call (2025)

Source: 2025-07-29 Apple Note. One-line brutal self-observation: Yahir caught himself making the move-to-Austin into his entire identity-output and called himself out.

TL;DR

  • "Your entire personality has been 'im moving to Austin' — you feel that if this doesn't happen you are a fraud and failed."
  • This is the cleanest self-call in the 2025 corpus. Yahir watching himself compress identity into a future-event, and naming the fraud-failure cliff if it doesn't happen.
  • Written 2 weeks before the 2025 08 21 Austin pack list — meaning the move did happen ~6 weeks later, but the meta-anxiety was already named.
  • Pattern: same shape as fear of not doing — the danger of treating a not-yet-realized move as identity-load.
  • Sets up the 2025 09 on Austin arrival note: if the move == identity, then arriving is a quiet collapse of identity-projection. The Emily arc starts a few weeks after arrival — possibly filling that void.

Connections

  • austin tx
  • fear of not doing
  • 2025 08 21 austin goodbye list and pack
  • 2025 09 20 on austin arrival
  • the emily arc

related.label: On Austin — the arrival reflection (alone, broke, ambition, Cam frustration, Hyde Park gym pitch)
